title: pilosella auriculoides subsp. huljakii
intro: Pilosella auriculoides subsp. huljakii, also known as a subspecies of the Autumn Hawk's-beard, is a plant species within the dandelion-like genus Pilosella. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella auriculoides subsp. huljakii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its role in supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
